name: Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine eggs and oil. Beat slightly.
2. Gradually beat in milk, flour, and salt until smooth.
3. Pour batter into 10 well-oiled custard cups. Place the cups on a baking sheet.
4. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 hour (375°F), or until firm and brown.
5. If desired, remove popovers from the oven after 45 minutes. Cut a slit in the side of each popover to let out steam.
6. Return the popovers to the oven for the last 15 minutes.
Makes 10 large popovers.
